pages.title: Armour Construction
pages.text: $(bold)Leather armour$()$(br)Assembled through leatherworking.$(p)$(bold)Plated armour$()$(br)Begins as finished modular chainmail.$(p)For a plate attachment:$(li)Choose the matching plate pattern$(li)Place matching chainmail as the target$(li)Work the plate material onto it

pages.title: Metal and Gem Plates
pages.text: $(bold)Metal plate$()$(br)Hammer it at the Tool Forge.$(p)$(bold)Gem plate$()$(br)Use the Gem Cutter's Knife at the Lapidary Table.$(p)A forged metal plate can also be gem-coated before assembly.$(p)Replacing a plate combines quality and preserves current armour damage.
